description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, on a schedule, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should run tests in a matrix of Python versions and platforms, including Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows, with concurrency control to cancel in-progress runs. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python with the specified version, install uv, and run tests using nox.
